reviews.title: Maternity Use
reviews.text: I'm very pregnant and had a hard time finding a swimsuit that fit, covered everything up, and didn't cost an arm and a leg. I decided to give this one a try. It was very flattering. The underneath portion is all connected. The shorts fabric is the same as the top. But from the waist to the bust, it is a thinner, super stretchy white fabric. So, even though my enormous belly the fabric wasn't tight or constricting feeling at all. It is a little difficult to get on, since it just pulls on. With the belly, I had to work in stages. Get the suit completely up over my butt. Then work to get the entire thing over my belly. That is really the hardest part, since the bust part has to be pulled over your belly to get the suit on. Then the last stage is getting the top situated. It is really supportive in the bust. I got tons of compliments on this swimsuit. Not sure how it will look when I'm not pregnant, but I will certainly try it out next summer and see.

reviews.title: I give up on this brand!
reviews.text:
I bumped up my review from 2 stars to 3 because after losing 30lbs I have been going clothes crazy and ordered a lot of jeans from different manufacturers. I found that my original complaint spanned across most brands when the jeans were too large in the thighs and rear. Must be something about the way the crotch area is cut. Some jeans are made for curvier shapes. I am slender, not curvy and not much butt to speak of. These jeans would be perfect for pear shaped ladies with a little more thigh and butt.
Original Review...
Something is definitely off with the pattern or sewing. I purchased 4 pairs in different colors and returned ALL of them. The thigh and crotch area seems to be cut too big and both the Olive and Dark Grey pairs made it look as though I dropped a load in my pants on the right side. The left side fit better. I know it isn't my body as I buy a lot of jeans and only this brand did that. Some colors worse than others. Olive being the most notable. In all cases, the thigh area was too big, especially the right leg. The black pair had sharp ridges and bulges throughout the entire leg. The worst being below the right knee. It looked like I had a huge tumor on the inside of my right leg below the knee. Having just purchased a perfect pair of YMI jeans (model# P485555), I was looking for other brands I might enjoy as well. The description and pictures looked like what I was seeking in a pair of well fitting jeans. No such luck in reality. In fact, The other pairs of YMI jeans I purchased have similar issues such as bunching in the wrong place, etc. The waist was too large and the thigh area as well. I pulled on the fabric to see where the issue was and found a spare 2" of fabric in the crotch area on the right side. They were uncomfortable and the right side felt noticeably larger. You can feel it when you walk and to make matters worse, it looked like I had dropped a load on the right side side of my pants. The left side looked great in the rear. I have an apple shaped body with narrow legs and not much butt. These jeans seem like they would fit a pear shaped body better. I bought a size 5 for my 5'3" 128lb body. A size 4 would may have been better, but it isn't an option. I loved the colors and the fabric, but they just weren't cut right and I returned them the very next day. I do own a pair in light grey and they fit, albeit not as comfortable as other jeans I own. a touch snug at the waist. Like they are an in between size and a half inch too small. I tried the White in a size 3. I give up. Most uncomfortable jeans ever. The waist fit, but everything felt uncomfortable when sitting. I think tight jeans should probably be made using a fabric with more elasticity. These are meant to be tight, right?

These Lee slim jeans fit good..I’m 5’2, size 10, there not too long, and are a true size 10.

But the sewing around one pockets puckers a little, and at the waist! Although once there on
It smoothes out. There should be more Quality Control .
That said, I like these jeans and would buy more..

reviews.title: Fantastic Jeans
reviews.text: Finally a pair of slimming pants that actually do what they are supposed to. These pants live up to their billing and have a good sense of compression. They are the perfect length for me at 5' 2". Exceptional quality and comfort. My only regret is the front pockets are not real pockets, but I love the pants anyway!

reviews.title: rayon elastic skirt
reviews.text: I love the colors... they are bright.  The waist is about an 8" elastic band.  There is a tie for the front... or you could tie to the side.  The bottom is all different lengths, which I was hoping would be a little less uneven.  You can wear over your bust area like a dress or coverup.  There are several ways to wear as dress. I am 5'7" and when up like a dress, it still covered my knees. I like the style, but I am an old hippie gal.  I don't love rayon, but that is mostly what you get these days. Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
reviews.author: AFZUK3MTBIBEDQOPAK3OATUOUKLA

reviews.title: This review is for people 5ft 1in and under
reviews.text: I am 5ft 1in and the skirt has to go up to my waist to fit, but it definitely works that way. I can see how it could be a dress, too. However, if you are even the slightest bit chubby in the tummy area, be ready for it to point that out. That being said, I'm the psychic at a murder mystery party and I believe it will serve its purpose. I also read someone had said it wrinkles easily - that is true. Overall, I am happy though.
